zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont是Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux和Agnes的女兒，於1057年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯沙吉可丁利貝蒙特。她於大約1080年與Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1135年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉享年78歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont是Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux和Agnes的女儿，于1057年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯沙吉可丁利貝蒙特。她于大约1080年与Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1135年在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉享年78岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont was born in 1057, in Ribemont, Saint-Quentin, Aisne, Picardie, France as the daughter of Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux and Agnes. She married Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec about 1080. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1135, in Falaise, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 78, and was buried in Falaise, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont est née en 1057, à Ribemont, Saint-Quentin, Aisne, Picardie, France, fille de Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux et Agnes. Elle a épousé Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec environ 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1135, à Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont wurde 1057 in Ribemont, Saint-Quentin, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux und Agnes geboren. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemontは1057年にフランスピカーディエイスンサイント-クエンティンリベモントでAnselme de Ribemont I Le VieuxとAgnesの娘として生まれた。約1080年にWalter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebecと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1135年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで78歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont(은)는 1057년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 세인트-크틴 리브몽에서 Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux(와)과 Agnes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont nasceu em 1057, em Ribemont, Saint-Quentin, Aisne, Picardie, França filha de Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux e Agnes. Ela casou-se com Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec aproximadamente 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1135, em Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ribemont родилась в 1057 г. в местности рибемонт, сеинт-куентинь, эисн, пикарди, Франция. Её родителей звали Anselme de Ribemont I Le Vieux и Agnes. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec около 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1135 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности фалеис, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.
